findings.title: Authentication Weakness Detected
findings.description: High-risk keywords related to authentication have been identified, indicating potential weaknesses in the authentication flow that could lead to unauthorized access.
assumptions: Existing authentication mechanisms may not meet security standards.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in multiple sources.

recommendations: Conduct a thorough review of the authentication flow and implement necessary security enhancements.

findings.title: Compliance Risk Identified
findings.description: High-risk keywords related to compliance have been detected, indicating potential violations of GDPR and CCPA regarding data handling and user consent.
assumptions: Data handling practices may not align with regulatory requirements.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in multiple sources.

recommendations: Conduct a legal review of data handling practices to ensure compliance with GDPR and CCPA.

metadata.mitigation: Legal review of data handling practices.

findings.title: Accessibility Risk Detected
findings.description: Low-risk keywords related to accessibility have been identified, indicating potential gaps in meeting WCAG AA standards.
assumptions: Accessibility features may not be fully implemented.
recommendations: Review and enhance accessibility features to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards.

summary: Identified 3 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 security). 2 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (2 blockers, 0 warnings).
